3092850.name: Valorwood (Early Access)
3092850.description:
Washed Ashore on a Living World

Awaken on the mystical Isle of Valor and set out on a journey shaped by time itself. In Valorwood, every realm, timeline, and dimension holds its own dangers, biomes, and secrets waiting to be uncovered. Each choice you make forges a new path through a world bound to the fabric of time.

Survival Across Realms

Develop vital survival skills to endure changing climates, gather resources, and adapt to harsh environments. From lush forests to hollow swamps and scorching deserts, each biome demands a different strategy as you hunt, craft, and thrive.

Explore Timelines and Dimensions

Journey beyond ordinary worlds into ancient civilizations and forgotten ages. Traverse realms such as the Celestial Realm, Underworld Realm, Apocalypse Dimension, Ancient Egypt Timeline, Dynasty Era Timeline, and Viking Age Timeline as you uncover the true story connecting them all.

Craft, Build, and Brew

Collect materials to forge tools, armor, and structures that empower your survival. Construct functional bases, create potions, and personalize your surroundings with decorative and practical elements that evolve with your progress.

Fight, Evolve, and Conquer

Master dynamic combat styles, from close-quarters strikes to long-range attacks and magical techniques. Unlock abilities like Forager, Beastmaster, and Necromancer, customizing your playstyle to face evolving threats across timelines.

Discover and Shape the World

Embark on main quests, side adventures, and hidden dungeons that reveal the deeper mysteries of Valorwood. Dynamic weather and time systems influence your journey, from clear skies to raging storms, creating a living world that constantly shifts around you.

Companions and Comforts

Tame creatures to aid your travels and join you in battle. Engage in peaceful pursuits like fishing, cooking, farming, and trading, or take on mini-games and challenges to earn rewards and customize your experience.

Key Features

  • Stylized open-world survival RPG spanning realms, timelines, and dimensions

  • Deep crafting, brewing, and base-building systems

  • Dynamic third-person combat with multiple playstyles and abilities

  • Procedural weather and biome diversity across regions

  • Quests, dungeons, factions, and hidden lore to uncover

  • Single-player, co-op, and multiplayer support

  • Companion taming, trading, farming, and side activities

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
